ogTitle: Gumbalie vs Gumly Gumly: Climate Safety

heading: Gumbalie vs Gumly Gumly — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gumbalie, New South Wales and Gumly Gumly, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gumbalie has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Gumly Gumly (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gumbalie or Gumly Gumly safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gumbalie has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Gumly Gumly scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gumbalie scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Gumly Gumly scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gumbalie or Gumly Gumly?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gumbalie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
